case.title: NOGUERAS v. PUERTO RICO INTERN. AIRLINES, INC.

opinion.h4: NOGUERAS v. PUERTO RICO INTERN. AIRLINES, INC., (1978)
opinion.h2: Nicolas NOGUERAS, Jr., et al., petitioners, v. PUERTO RICO INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES, INC., et al No. 77-1034
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the First Circuit.
Denied.[ Nogueras v. Puerto Rico Intern. Airlines, Inc. (1978) ]
